source_old_req: The Attitude_Control_Function component must assume that the nominal_attitude input is a valid attitude vector, the sensored_attitude input is valid GYR_data, and the sun_direction input is valid FSS_data, all within reasonable operational ranges. The component must guarantee that the reference_torque output is always within the maximum rated torque envelope defined for the RW_data actuator. Additionally, due to the 500 µs periodic scheduling of the Attitude_Control_Function thread, the component must guarantee that the step amplitude of the reference_torque output between consecutive scheduling cycles does not exceed the structural smoothness threshold to prevent high-frequency oscillations that could cause spacecraft structural resonance. These guarantees apply to the component interface only and do not extend to the implementation layer.
natural_requirement: The Attitude_Control_Function component shall execute according to the scheduling and timing constraints defined for Attitude_Control_Function.impl. The implementation shall use the Periodic dispatch protocol, execute with a period of 500 us, meet a deadline of 500 us, complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 250 us, and run at priority 1.

requirement_items.text: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic.

requirement_items.text: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 250 us.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 250 us.

requirement_items.text: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall execute with a period of 500 us.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Period as 500 us.

requirement_items.text: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 500 us.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Deadline as 500 us.

requirement_items.text: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall run at priority 1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Priority as 1.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 250 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Period as 500 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Deadline as 500 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall assign Priority as 1.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 250 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall execute with a period of 500 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall meet a deadline of 500 us. The Attitude_Control_Function.impl implementation shall run at priority 1.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
